message:
fix: add CompatRuntime import and fix borrow-checker issue in PaneStepExecutor

The linter auto-committed the PaneStepExecutor implementation (95a9b03)
but missed two critical fixes needed for compilation with subprocess-bridge:
- Import `CompatRuntime` trait so `rt.block_on()` resolves
- Clone `timeout_ms` before thread::spawn to avoid lifetime escape

All 13 PaneStepExecutor tests pass. Closes ft-y9lnb.1.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
